subcodes.first_line: They [the friends] should establish beyond a shadow of doubt that by “Unity of God” is meant that the Manifestations of God Who inaugurate each Dispensation are to be regarded as one soul
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @Imam 'Ali
